---
pagetitle: "Postavljanje, sučelja i cijene — AI radionica"
lang: hr
format:
  html:
    theme: [cosmo, theme-doc.scss]
    toc: true
    toc-title: "Sadržaj"
    toc-location: left
    embed-resources: true
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
        <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Roboto+Mono:wght@300;400;500;700&family=Source+Sans+3:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
---

{{< include radionica/01-postavljanje/README.md >}}
